description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard storage box with a light brown, corrugated texture and a visible seam of gray packing tape running along the top. One side of the box features printed black symbols and text, including handling instructions, recycling icons, and a product code, indicating it is designed for shipping or storage. The box appears to be fully closed, with no visible openings or flaps, and the tape is securely affixed. The surface is matte and slightly rough, typical of cardboard, and the box is likely hollow inside, intended to contain or transport items. There are no visible handles or locking mechanisms, and the box is stackable and suitable for placement on floors, shelves, or in garages. The overall appearance suggests it is a standard shipping or moving box commonly found in urban environments.
description: A light brown cardboard storage box with a taped top and printed handling symbols on one side. The box is closed, stackable, and designed for shipping or storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the taped seam running down the center of the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain cardboard surface and no visible markings or tape.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the taped seam visible but no printed symbols.
description_view_3: Side view displaying printed handling symbols, product code, and recycling icons.
attribute_lid_type: sealed flat top with adhesive tape
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed handling symbols and product code
